search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com as requested. Prioritized direct guide/wiki pages over home pages. Single-page findings are discovery leads only; each mechanic or cost item still needs separate verification.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Dedicated heroes page with roster, hero stats/equipment sections, and character-level guide content.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster and character guidance for team building.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page covering 9 laboratory categories and level-by-level badge costs.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories and badge costs for progression planning.
claims_to_verify: Unlock path details for research upgrades

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Starter guide with early progression advice, including heroes, buildings, and alliance basics.
results.primary_user_job: Learn early-game priorities and avoid beginner mistakes.

search_records.search_notes: Searched only the approved domain per instructions. No matching indexed pages were returned for this query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No results found in the allowed domain for the provided query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to lastz.fandom.com. Results emphasize event mechanics and hero/research progress hooks. No public-facing claims should be treated as verified from a single page alone.

results.title: Full Preparedness
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycles include a research-focused theme and a hero-upgrade theme, with points tied to research speedups and hero materials.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks that reward research or hero upgrades.
claims_to_verify: Point values for research and hero actions
Reward chest contents and ranking payouts

results.title: Heroes
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page; identifies hero classes and lists the main power factors, useful for linking hero growth to event objectives.
results.primary_user_job: Understand hero types and what boosts hero power.

results.title: Event Center
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events; establishes where daily events are accessed and reset.
results.primary_user_job: Locate daily and special event entries in game.

search_records.search_notes: Searched allowed domain only. No qualifying Packsify results found for the query. Kept to discovery and cross-validation use only.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed pages matched the approved Packsify query within the allowed domain.

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to mmediamreza.com and focused on Last Z: Survival Shooter pages surfaced by site query. Generic homepage and off-topic pages were excluded. Results are discovery leads only.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for training ranged units; covers unlock needs, training cap, speed, and upgrade table.
results.primary_user_job: Find how to unlock and upgrade Shooter Camp efficiently.
claims_to_verify: HQ level and research unlock requirement
training cap and speed changes by level

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for melee/strike troop training; highlights training speed, cap, and power progression.
results.primary_user_job: Find how to unlock and upgrade Assaulter Camp efficiently.

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Research-building guide; explains tech research, queue management, and unlocking a second lab.
results.primary_user_job: Find lab unlocks and research progression details.
